TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s == Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 4 jiyax 25 ka Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Costa riga ta sayang o kiya ka Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 5 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera (Kari Spain: Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera kngkawas 1958 idas 4 diyax 25-) pa Seyji Jnwu Costa Rica, mnKongmin Singtong Tang. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera u mniq kngkawas 2014 Jnwu Costa Knbeyhing Seyngkyo cida mnuda mn2 meytaq hyo daw wada mbiyax, wada mndungus bay mangal Soto Costa Rica. Kndusan Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera pa niqan llutuc dara sediq Jamaica mi Hwajn ka hiya. Kngkawas 1977 cida u tumal Qnlhangan Mtrawah Tang. Kngkawasw 1979 cida daw wada mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Costa Rica Rikisi Swey Sweywey. Buykuy daw mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Tulan Keykyoso Swos Sweywey. Kngkawas 1981 dhuq kngkawas 1987 u Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Costa Rica ngalan Huku Cyawso. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq kngkawas 1985 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Michigan ngalan Fulbright Keykaku Sweyce. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera u wada pkla knou bay quri qnlhangan mi kwoci swu na rungbung mi patas. Kngkawas 2009 cida tumal Kongmin Singtong Tang. Kngkawas 2015 idas 1 diyax 6, muda homung Cyokoku iyax cida wada mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Cyokoku Jnmin Minggi Hakasey Sweywey, pnsdhuwan splawa ngalan Ramey Keyngkyo Congsin Minggi Komung. Pnyahan pnatas Watan Diro
S.PHON: == luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s == mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶osta …ĺiga ta sajaŇč o kija ka luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa (ka…ĺi spain: luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **-) pa s…ô…üi …ünwu ¶osta …ĺi ¶a, mnkoŇčmin siŇčtoŇč taŇč. luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa u mniq kŇčkawas **** …ünwu ¶osta knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida mnuda mn* m…ôtaq ńßjo daw wada mbijax, wada mnduŇčus baj maŇčal soto ¶osta …ĺi ¶a. kndusan luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa pa niqan llutu ¶ da…ĺa s…ôdiq …üamai ¶a mi ńßwa…ün ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u tumal qnlńßaŇčan mt…ĺawańß taŇč. kŇčkawasw **** ¶ida daw wada maŇčal pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶osta …ĺi ¶a …ĺikisi sw…ô sw…ôw…ô. bujkuj daw maŇčal pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč tulan k…ôkjoso swos sw…ôw…ô. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** u luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶osta …ĺi ¶a Ňčalan ńßuku ¶jawso. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč mi ¶ńßigan Ňčalan *ulb…ĺigńßt k…ôkaku sw…ô ¶…ô. luis guill…ô…ĺmo sol*s …ĺi*…ô…ĺa u wada pkla knou baj qu…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan mi kwo ¶i swu na …ĺuŇčbuŇč mi patas. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida tumal koŇčmin siŇčtoŇč taŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, muda ńßomuŇč ¶jokoku ijax ¶ida wada maŇčal pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ¶jokoku …ünmin miŇčgi ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô, pnsdńßuwan splawa Ňčalan …ĺam…ô k…ôŇčkjo ¶oŇčsin miŇčgi komuŇč. pnjańßan pnatas watan di…ĺo
S.FORM: == Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s == Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 4 jiyax 25 ka Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Costa riga ta sayang o kiya ka Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 5 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera (Kari Spain: Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera kngkawas 1958 idas 4 diyax 25-) pa Seyji Jnwu Costa Rica, mnKongmin Singtong Tang. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera u mniq kngkawas 2014 Jnwu Costa Knbeyhing Seyngkyo cida mnuda mn2 meytaq hyo daw wada mbiyax, wada mndungus bay mangal Soto Costa Rica. Kndusan Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera pa niqan llutuc dara sediq Jamaica mi Hwajn ka hiya. Kngkawas 1977 cida u tumal Qnlhangan Mtrawah Tang. Kngkawasw 1979 cida daw wada mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Costa Rica Rikisi Swey Sweywey. Buykuy daw mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Tulan Keykyoso Swos Sweywey. Kngkawas 1981 dhuq kngkawas 1987 u Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Costa Rica ngalan Huku Cyawso. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq kngkawas 1985 mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Michigan ngalan Fulbright Keykaku Sweyce. Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s Rivera u wada pkla knou bay quri qnlhangan mi kwoci swu na rungbung mi patas. Kngkawas 2009 cida tumal Kongmin Singtong Tang. Kngkawas 2015 idas 1 diyax 6, muda homung Cyokoku iyax cida wada mangal Pyasan Tubeyhing Cyokoku Jnmin Minggi Hakasey Sweywey, pnsdhuwan splawa ngalan Ramey Keyngkyo Congsin Minggi Komung. Pnyahan pnatas Watan Diro
